subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous palace is located in Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर में किस नामी पलकों में से एक है।
explanation_en: Hawa Mahal is a famous palace located in Jaipur.
explanation_hi: हावा महाल जैसे पतित बाथा मंदिर को जैसे पतित बाथा मंदिर का नाम है।

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the first Rai Pratap Singh?
question_hi: राजस्थान के पहले अलीकाना कौन था ?
A_hi: राजस्थान के पहले अलीकाना राइयांशी I था।
explanation_en: Rai Singh I was the first Rai of Ajmer. He was a general in the service of Raja Pratap Singh. After Pratap Singh's death, Rai Singh I ascended to the throne and became the ruler of Ajmer.
